task_completion.description: Create a forensic case with the specified name and case number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The forensic tool (e.g., Autopsy) displays the case name 'Warrant_Compliance_2024' and case number 'INV-WAR-011' in the new case wizard, case properties, or application title bar.

task_completion.description: Ingest the correct disk image into the forensic case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The forensic tool's data source tree or ingestion wizard shows '/home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd' as an added data source.

task_completion.description: Identify and filter for allocated JPEG files, excluding deleted or carved files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The forensic tool's file listing shows JPEG files (.jpg/.jpeg) with visual indicators that they are allocated (e.g., no 'deleted' flag, 'Dir' status instead of 'Unalloc', or a specific filter applied to hide deleted/carved files).

task_completion.description: Extract the allocated JPEG files to the specified export directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows the extracted .jpg or .jpeg files located inside the '/home/ga/Reports/Allocated_Media/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create a chain-of-custody manifest CSV with the required headers and file details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or spreadsheet application displays the file '/home/ga/Reports/media_manifest.csv' containing the exact headers 'FILENAME,MD5_HASH,FILE_SIZE_BYTES' and rows populated with the extracted file data.

integrity.description: The agent used a genuine forensic GUI application to analyze the disk image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a forensic tool's graphical interface (like Autopsy) rather than relying solely on text editors or basic terminal commands to fake the process.

integrity.description: The manifest CSV contains authentic file metadata.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains realistic 32-character hex strings for MD5 hashes and valid numeric file sizes, rather than hallucinated placeholders or copy-pasted text from the prompt.

integrity.description: The agent did not extract files from deleted or unallocated space.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no visual evidence of the agent selecting, viewing, or exporting files from nodes labeled 'Deleted Files', 'Orphan Files', 'Carved Files', or 'Unallocated Space' in the forensic tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
